title: Data Backup & Recovery
summary: Schedule and procedures for backing up critical data and recovering from failures.
purpose: Protect Circle Gas data from loss and ensure recovery within defined RTO and RPO targets.
scope: All servers, cloud services, and critical data stores across Circle Gas markets.

roles.responsibility: Runs and monitors daily backup jobs. Performs restores.
Reviews backup reports weekly. Approves recovery operations for critical systems.

steps.title: Verify daily backup completion
steps.description: Each morning, check the backup dashboard (Veeam / Azure Backup — see IT Glue) for the previous night's backup status. All jobs should show 'Success'. Investigate any 'Warning' or 'Failed' jobs immediately.
steps.notes: Backup alerts should also be sent by email — check your inbox if you have not logged into the dashboard.
checklist: Failure escalated to IT Manager if not resolved within 2 hours

steps.title: Run weekly backup integrity test
steps.description: Every Monday, select one backup set at random and perform a test restore to the recovery sandbox environment. Confirm the restored data is accessible and uncorrupted.
steps.notes: Document the result in the Backup Test Log (SharePoint). A failed integrity test must be escalated the same day.
checklist: Result logged in Backup Test Log

steps.title: Respond to a data loss or recovery request
steps.description: When a recovery request is received: log the ticket, confirm scope of loss (which data, which time period), obtain IT Manager approval for production restores, and perform the restore from the most recent clean backup.
steps.notes: Never overwrite live data during a restore — always restore to a staging location first, then move.
checklist: Data verified before moving to production

steps.title: Update backup schedule for new systems
steps.description: When a new server or critical data store is added, ensure it is added to the backup schedule within 24 hours of go-live. Update the Backup Asset Register in IT Glue.
steps.notes: No new system should go to production without backup coverage.
checklist: Backup Asset Register updated in IT Glue

changeHistory.author: IT Manager
changeHistory.notes: Initial version. Under review for RTO/RPO target update.
